action_boundary: Should demo extension S7-EXT-018 remain active?
communication_boundary: The answer must keep the exact user, group, window, and ticket separate.

documents.text: This source record is synthetic and fictional. It contains no real customer, worker, vendor, bank, security, payment, logistics, public-benefits, legal, or operational data.
Demo extension request S7-018 names user U18, group G18-ADMIN, ticket T18, and window W18.
User clearance USR-S7-018 names user U18.
Group clearance GRP-S7-018 names group G18-READ.
Window record WIN-S7-018 names window W18.
Ticket record TIC-S7-018 names ticket T18.
Extension requires same user, group, window, and ticket in the request and clearance records.
